rationale: The citing paper appears to cite Kivetz and Simonson (2002) only once, in the General Discussion, as part of a grouped parenthetical example that prior work shows effort can justify vice consumption. The citation is not used in the core theory development, hypotheses, experimental design, measures, or main result interpretation of the physical-involvement account. Because its role is a brief background/example reference rather than a paper-specific building block, the function is best classified as mention-only.
